mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `a_asset` (`type`, `uid`, `symbol`, `locked`, `balance`, `frozen`) VALUES (#{type}, #{uid}, #{symbol},#{locked},#{balance},#{frozen}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `locked` = `locked` + #{locked}, `balance` = `balance` + #{balance}, `frozen` = `frozen` + #{frozen}
mapper.update: update a_asset set fund_balance = fund_t0_balance, fund_t0_balance = balance, fund_ymd = #{ymd} where fund_ymd < #{ymd} and type = 0 and symbol = 'USDT'
mapper.select: select symbol, sum(balance) balance from a_asset where id > 1 group by symbol
